title: "The Lord Was With Joseph - Part 1" Genesis 39:1-6

notes.introduction: A verse-by-verse study of Genesis 39:1-6 examining the repeated biblical statement that 'the Lord was with Joseph' as Joseph serves in the house of Potiphar and is elevated to the position of overseer, with attention to what his conduct as a servant reveals about living in awareness of God's presence.
outline: I. Introduction: the timeline of Joseph's service, establishing that Genesis 39 spans roughly 10 years from age 17 to age 30, and that the phrase 'the Lord was with Joseph' appears four times in the chapter

II. Joseph the Overseer (vv. 1-6): Potiphar's observation that the Lord was with Joseph, the prosperity and blessing that followed, Joseph's promotion to overseer over all of Potiphar's house, and the New Testament servant-master principles in Ephesians 6 and Colossians 3 that parallel Joseph's conduct
